original_statement: what is the most common position/rank achieved?
mutated_statement: what is the most common something done?
mutation_analysis: 实体泛化 + 动作泛化: 具体名词 "position/rank" 被替换为模糊占位词 "something" (position/rank → something) | 动词 "achieved" 被替换为更泛化的 "done" (achieved → done)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中说明（“The "event" column entries...Count the occurrences...The most common event is "400 m"”）以及iteration 0中simple_query的thought（直接统计并得出“400 m”为最常见），可以看出agent直接将模糊的“something done”当作事件列处理并统计频次。日志中没有任何提到不确定性、歧义或请求澄清的文字，也未表示需要更多信息。因其未识别到问题中“something/ done”为泛化占位而未寻求澄清，故判定为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
